Partition-table detection happens in `block/partitions/core.c`:

- **`check_partition()`** — `block/partitions/core.c:119`. Iterates the `check_part[]` array (`block/partitions/core.c:17`) of per-format probe functions (e.g. `msdos_partition`, `efi_partition`, `mac_partition`, etc.), calling each in turn (`check_part[i++](state)` at `block/partitions/core.c:143`) until one succeeds.
- **`blk_add_partitions()`** — `block/partitions/core.c:583`. Calls `check_partition()` to get the parsed table, then for each slot calls `blk_add_partition()` (`block/partitions/core.c:531`, invoked at `:635`), which itself calls `add_partition()` (`block/partitions/core.c:295`) to actually register/add the discovered partition.","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"0d7d1ee2-4217-4ec1-8518-29f601354ce5","total_cost_usd":0.2451408,"usage":{"input_tokens":10,"cache_creation_input_tokens":26320,"cache_read_input_tokens":236236,"output_tokens":1088,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":26320,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"not_available","iterations":[{"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":294,"cache_read_input_tokens":54465,"cache_creation_input_tokens":818,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":818},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-sonnet-5":{"inputTokens":10,"outputTokens":1088,"cacheReadInputTokens":236236,"cacheCreationInputTokens":26320,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":0.2451408,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"af1a34d2-b747-4908-90bf-a2d9405fdcab"}
